note: RuntimePlaytest bind uses ShapePlacementSession, ShapeAwareItemTrayGrid, and MobileShapePlacementInputExtension.
Clicking a tray item starts the session with the tray grid anchor.
Clicking the already selected shape rotates through the session authority.
Dragging over the board generates a ghost preview without committing.
Release locks the ghost and leaves receiver commit count unchanged.
Dragging a locked ghost moves the preview and relocks it.
Clicking the locked ghost is the only commit path.
Invalid preview stays red, cannot lock, and does not commit.
Cancel clears the visible ghost and calls receiver cancel.
